title: Lens-tap Hand-cover Transition
description: Chic Turkish woman taps the lens twice, then covers it completely. Perfect clean transition asset for CapCut.

prompt.concept: Lens-tap into a hand-cover transition. Extreme close-up: the chic Turkish woman leans in, taps the lens twice with her index finger to grab your attention, then her open palm rises and completely covers the lens — frame goes fully black. (Editor will use this as a transition cut in CapCut to reveal a new scene/outfit on the other side.) Designed as a clean transition asset.

character.build: athletic and feminine — sporty toned shoulders and arms, slim waist, soft natural curves; sexy but strong
character.skin: fair white skin, glowy, lightly sun-kissed warmth, subtle freckles
character.hair: long soft wavy 'kumral' chestnut-brown with warm caramel highlights, middle part
character.makeup: clean glowy makeup, dewy finish, soft blush, glossy nude-pink lip

wardrobe.top: fitted ribbed tank top with thin spaghetti straps, butter yellow, plain (no logos)
wardrobe.jewelry: dainty gold layered necklaces, small gold hoops, one thin gold ring

camera.shot: extreme close-up, her face fills most of the frame
camera.angle: eye level, dead-on with the lens
camera.lens_feel: iPhone-shot look, shallow depth, sharp on her face and hand

action_timeline.beat: she holds eye contact with the lens, soft confident smirk
raises her index finger and taps the lens softly — TAP 1
she opens her hand, palm forward, and slowly raises it toward the lens
her palm reaches the lens and completely covers it — frame transitions smoothly to FULL BLACK as the palm blocks all light, palm visible briefly as it approaches before the cover-out
FULL BLACK held — clean black frame for the editor to cut on, perfect transition point

performance_notes.cover_style: smooth, deliberate, palm flat against the lens — should feel like a magician's reveal setup
performance_notes.transition_design: the final 1 second of pure black is intentional so the editor can cut to a new scene in CapCut (outfit change, location change, etc.)
do_not: leave gaps where light leaks through the palm

ambient_sounds: warm room tone fading to silence

no_text_no_graphics.note: clean plate — designed specifically as a transition asset for CapCut

audio.ambient: tap, tap, palm contact, fade to silence
